name: cupcat
description: Free, local, AI-native video editor for Windows. Claude edits your timeline over MCP; media generation via your own Higgsfield account.

scripts.build:bridge: bun run build:core && bun build --compile apps/bridge/src/index.ts --outfile dist-bridge/cupcat-bridge.exe
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:core && bun --filter @cupcat/editor-core typecheck && bun --filter @cupcat/bridge typecheck && bun --filter @cupcat/web typecheck
